basic_details.short_information: The Punjab Subordinate Services Selection Board (PSSSB) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 06 Line Superintendent. Candidates with Diploma Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 15-05-2026, and closes on 05-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through PSSSB website, sssb.punjab.gov.in.

age_limit.age_details: For Group-C posts: Must secure minimum 50% marks in qualifying Punjabi Language test equivalent to Matriculation standard — as per Punjab Govt. Notification No. GSR72/Const./Art.309/Amd.(22)/2022 dated 28.10.2022

qualification.education_qualification: Three years Diploma in Electrical Engineering from a recognized institution

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 35,400/- (Level-6) as per 7th Central Pay Commission Pay Scale + Allowances

selection_process: Written Examination (MCQ) – Part A (Qualifying) + Part B (Merit) → Counselling/Document Verification
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the SSSB Punjab portal https://sssb.punjab.gov.in. Applications submitted by any other mode (post, in person, etc.) will not be accepted and will be rejected.
seo_tags: PSSSB Group C Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 06 Line Superintendent Posts
